title: stelis bracteata
intro: Stelis bracteata is a species of orchid, commonly known as the "Mexican stelis" or "little stelis," which belongs to the genus Stelis in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis bracteata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Stelis bracteata is prepared as a tea or infusion, and its roots and leaves are also used in herbal preparations to promote overall well-being.
